name: Do I need to stuff my pages with keywords or stats for GEO?
description: No. GEO works better with clear, useful, evidence-based content than with keyword stuffing.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to stuff my pages with keywords or stats for GEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: You do not need to stuff every page with keywords or statistics. What matters is clear language, a clean hierarchy, and enough evidence to make the content credible. One well-written answer with supporting details is usually better than a keyword-heavy page with no substance.
acceptedAnswer.description: No. GEO works better with clear, useful, evidence-based content than with keyword stuffing.
